revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-5-170

1. A light in which the total duration of light in each period is clearly longer than the total duration of darkness and in which the intervals of darkness (occultations) are all of equal duration.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig42.jpg|400px|border]]

Reference: N.L.


2. Commonly used for a single-occulting light.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Occulting Light}}
